description: You are an archivist at the Pacific Northwest Historical Society formatting a raw transcript of an oral history interview about the 1980 Mount St. Helens eruption located at /home/ga/Documents/mt_st_helens_transcript.odt. To meet archival standards, format the top five lines of metadata into a two-column table followed by a page break. Add a right-aligned document header with the text 'Archive Ref: MSH-1980-04' to all pages. Apply 1.5 line spacing to the transcript body and italicize all paragraphs beginning with 'Q:' to distinguish the interviewer's questions. Save the completed document.
